revision_priority: Make the Amazon Ads fit explicit by rewriting the summary and one DiDi bullet to name campaign measurement, reporting quality, or experimentation as the transferable bridge.
Clean up the presentation layer by removing bold from non-technical qualifiers and renaming the `Cloud` skills bucket to a clearer infrastructure category.
revision_instructions: Rewrite `Professional Summary` so sentence 1 leads with commerce data/workflow systems delivery and sentence 2 or 3 explicitly ties that work to campaign reporting, experimentation, or operational data quality. Update one DiDi bullet or the DiDi project baseline so the Ads relevance is visible in the body, not implied. Remove bold from modifier adjectives like `team-maintained` and `existing`, and keep bold reserved for technologies and quantified metrics. Rename `Cloud` to `Infra/Data Systems` or split it into narrower categories so the skills section scans faster.
